question: Use a short vendor trial before committing to annual billing?
reasoning: Unknown support quality makes annual billing risky.
expected_outcome: Learn support quality before spending the annual budget
falsifier: Annual discount is large enough and support references are strong

branches.label: annual billing now
branches.would_be_right_if: Annual discount is large enough and support references are strong

question: Pilot the async planning ritual with one team before rolling it out?
reasoning: The ritual may create coordination overhead if imposed everywhere.
expected_outcome: Find the template flaws before broad rollout
falsifier: Every team has the same planning pain and wants the same template

branches.label: roll out to all teams
branches.would_be_right_if: Every team has the same planning pain and wants the same template

question: Delay the workshop until the research interviews are complete?
reasoning: The workshop agenda depends on customer language from interviews.
expected_outcome: A sharper workshop with fewer speculative exercises
falsifier: Calendar momentum matters more than interview completeness

branches.label: run workshop now
branches.would_be_right_if: Calendar momentum matters more than interview completeness
